expectations.text: Enables grounding via tools: [{ googleSearch: {} }] in config
States Web Search grounding works on both Nano Banana 2 and Pro (not Pro-only)
expectations.evidence: 'only with Nano Banana Pro, not the base Nano Banana' — wrong; grounding works on both (and it's unaware of NB2)

expectations.text: States every generated image carries an invisible SynthID watermark
States there is NO API flag to disable the SynthID watermark
expectations.evidence: 'Always on, cannot be disabled — no API flag'

expectations.text: Does not invent a disable parameter; distinguishes consumer 'Gemini sparkle' from always-on SynthID
expectations.evidence: Separates SynthID from visible sparkle; does not invent a disable param
